verdict: An exceptionally well-timed and rhythmic chart that beautifully captures the song's tempo shifts and syncopation, held back only by a single unplayable triple-press sequence.

issues.problem: While holding both U and D (which occupies both feet), there is a tap on R at 34.494. This creates an unplayable three-panel pattern (a 'hand') without a third foot, forcing an awkward bracket or resulting in a dropped hold.
